title: Read cron tick implementation — no_agent mode, script resolution
completion_summary: Read cron/scheduler.py (tick, run_job, _run_job_script, _get_script_timeout, _parse_wake_gate) and cron/jobs.py (no_agent validation). Documented: (1) the tick() lifecycle — file lock, get_due_jobs, advance_next_run-before-execute, env/config-driven parallelism, sequential-vs-parallel partition by workdir, ThreadPoolExecutor with copy_context, post-tick MCP orphan reap; (2) the no_agent short-circuit at run_job:983 — bypasses run_agent/SessionDB imports entirely, requires script, applies workdir as cwd, four output outcomes (failure alert / silent / wakeAgent-gate silent / verbatim stdout); (3) script resolution in _run_job_script — HERMES_HOME/scripts sandbox via path.relative_to, extension-not-shebang interpreter pick (.sh/.bash -> /bin/bash, else sys.executable), redact_sensitive_text on stdout+stderr, four-way failure encoding; (4) timeout precedence module > env > config > default; (5) Apprentice implications for Observer/Detector pipeline. Deliverable: notes/cron-tick-implementation.md.
acceptance_criteria: Document tick flow and no_agent mode
